projectDescription: An Angular-based dashboard frontend for managing an intergalactic tournament — including species management, battle simulation, and ranking statistics.
keyFeatures: Species management with create, edit, and paginated listing
Battle simulation between two selected species with winner resolution
Random battle generation against the backend API
Victory ranking leaderboard with sortable table
Overview dashboard with total species count, top-3 ranking, and last battle
Angular Material table with sorting and pagination
Toast alert system for user feedback
Docker + Nginx deployment with runtime API URL injection
publicApiSurface: GET /api/species?page&size&name — paginated species list with optional name filter
GET /api/species/:id — get a single species by ID
POST /api/species — create a new species (SpecieRequest: name, powerLevel, specialAbility)
POST /api/battles — start a battle (BattleRequest: fighterLeftId, fighterRightId) → BattleResult
POST /api/battles/random — start a random battle → BattleResult
GET /api/battle-statistics/ranking — get species victory ranking → RankingResponse[]
GET /api/dashboard — get dashboard summary (DashboardDTO: totalSpecies, top3Ranking, lastBattle)
